title: Paramètres
select_language: Choisissez votre langue préférée pour l'interface
change_password_subtitle: Mettez à jour le mot de passe de votre compte
twofa_what_is_desc: Une application d'authentification génère un code temporaire à 6 chiffres qui change toutes les 30 secondes. Elle ajoute une couche de sécurité supplémentaire — même si quelqu'un connaît votre mot de passe, il ne pourra pas se connecter sans le code de votre téléphone.
twofa_download_prompt: Téléchargez une application d'authentification gratuite si vous n'en avez pas :
twofa_scan_qr: Scannez ce code QR avec votre application d'authentification
twofa_code_description: Entrez le code à 6 chiffres de votre application d'authentification
twofa_disable_warning: Cela réduira la sécurité de votre compte
twofa_disable_desc: Sans 2FA, votre compte ne sera protégé que par votre mot de passe.
backup_codes_warning: Conservez ces codes en lieu sûr
backup_codes_desc: Chaque code de secours ne peut être utilisé qu'une seule fois. Si vous perdez l'accès à votre application d'authentification, vous pouvez utiliser ces codes pour vous connecter.
passkey_multi_device_note: Vous pouvez enregistrer des passkeys sur plusieurs appareils. Chaque appareil a besoin de son propre passkey sauf si votre fournisseur les synchronise (ex. Trousseau iCloud entre appareils Apple, Google Password Manager entre Android et Chrome).
passkey_device_tip: Enregistrez un passkey sur chaque appareil que vous utilisez. Pour ajouter votre téléphone, ouvrez cette page sur votre téléphone.
passkey_confirm_remove_all_body: Êtes-vous sûr de vouloir supprimer tous les passkeys ? Vous devrez les reconfigurer sur chaque appareil.

delete_modal.title: Delete Account
delete_modal.warning: Warning: This action cannot be undone
delete_modal.warning_desc: All your data, including listings, messages, and transaction history will be permanently deleted.

password.show_current: Afficher le mot de passe actuel
password.hide_new: Masquer le nouveau mot de passe
password.show_new: Afficher le nouveau mot de passe

insurance.title: Insurance Certificates
insurance.description: Upload your insurance certificates for verification. Accepted formats: PDF, JPG, PNG (max 10MB).

notification_descriptions.listing_activity: Updates about your listings (new responses, etc.)
notification_descriptions.new_reviews: New reviews received on your profile or listings
notification_descriptions.gamification_digest: Periodic summary of your gamification activity and progress
notification_descriptions.achievement_milestones: Badge unlocks, level ups, and achievement notifications
notification_descriptions.weekly_digest: A weekly summary of community activity
notification_descriptions.membership_updates: Member joins, leaves, and membership changes
notification_descriptions.mutual_match_alerts: Get notified when someone you matched with also matches you

notification_descriptions.marketing_emails: Receive newsletters, promotions, and community updates

match_digest.frequency_description: How often you receive match digest emails

privacy_descriptions.allow_contact: Allow other members to contact me

federation.title: Federation Settings
federation.description: Manage your visibility and preferences across partner communities

gdpr.title: Data & Privacy Rights
gdpr.description: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to access, export, and request deletion of your personal data. These requests are processed within 30 days.
gdpr.info: All six GDPR data subject rights are available above. Contact our Data Protection Officer for any additional concerns.
gdpr.download_desc: Get a copy of all your personal data
gdpr.portability_desc: Export data in a machine-readable format
gdpr.deletion_desc: Request permanent deletion of your data
gdpr.rectification_desc: Request correction of inaccurate personal data
gdpr.restriction_desc: Request restriction of your data processing
gdpr.objection_desc: Object to processing of your personal data
gdpr.deletion_modal_desc: Once your data is deleted, it cannot be recovered. Your account and all associated data will be permanently removed.
gdpr.download_modal_desc: We will prepare a downloadable archive of all your personal data, including your profile, listings, messages, and transaction history. You will receive an email with a download link within 30 days.
gdpr.portability_modal_desc: We will export your data in a structured, commonly used, and machine-readable format (JSON/CSV). This allows you to transfer your data to another service. You will receive an email within 30 days.
gdpr.rectification_modal_desc: Request correction of any inaccurate or incomplete personal data we hold about you. We will review your request and update the records within 30 days.
gdpr.restriction_modal_desc: Request that we restrict the processing of your personal data. While restricted, we will store but not actively process your data. We will respond within 30 days.
gdpr.objection_modal_desc: Object to the processing of your personal data for specific purposes, such as direct marketing or profiling. We will review your objection within 30 days.
gdpr.confirmation_email: A confirmation email will be sent to your registered email address.

skills.title: Your Skills
skills.description: Add skills to your profile so other members can find you. Community members can endorse your skills.

logout_modal.title: Log Out
logout_modal.confirm_message: Are you sure you want to log out of your account?
